channel.title: supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: ApiSpecification Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: The machine-readable definition of the API's endpoints, schemas, and security requirements. Architectural overview of the ApiSpecification domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Documentation Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: The primary domain responsible for rendering the developer-facing guide and API reference materials. Architectural overview of the Documentation domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Security Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Handles the documentation and configuration of access control and identity verification. Architectural overview of the Security domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File
